name: LoadRunner
description: Enterprise performance testing suite from OpenText (ex Micro Focus) simulating virtual users across protocols for mission-critical applications.

seo.title: LoadRunner — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: LoadRunner: Enterprise performance testing suite from OpenText (ex Micro Focus) simulating virtual users across protocols for mission-critical applications.

when_to_use: Enterprise-grade virtual user simulation at 100K+ VUsers
Protocol coverage: HTTP, SAP, Citrix, Oracle Forms
Transaction SLA thresholds with pass/fail CI integration
Correlate server metrics with load test results in analysis

pros: Massive protocol coverage beyond plain HTTP
Strong for SAP, Citrix, mainframe workloads
cons: Steep learning curve, specialist skill set
Feels dated versus k6 and Gatling
review.verdict: Still unmatched on legacy protocols and scale, wildly overkill everywhere else.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises load-testing SAP, Citrix or mainframe applications
review.not_for: Modern web and API stacks where open-source tools do the job for free

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
